title: nerisyrenia johnstonii
intro: Nerisyrenia johnstonii, also known as Johnston's crinkle-leaf, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, which is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Nerisyrenia johnstonii include its ability to relieve bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Herbal preparations of Nerisyrenia johnstonii typically involve infusing its leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
